normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 3.3 - Exhibition and Display Homes
scope_summary: Sets assessment criteria and operational controls for exhibition and display homes (dwellings designed for future permanent residential use and used for an initial display period) within the City of Melville, applying to residential, commercial and mixed use developments. Exhibition/display home is a use not listed under LPS6 and is assessed under the use-not-listed procedures; the policy covers parking, fencing, flood lighting, signage, the approval period and public advertising. It does not apply to sales suites.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: developments of more than three exhibition/display homes (up to three: R-Codes parking only)
front wire fence permitted for display homes (no barbed wire)

key_numeric_standards.unit: pm (extinguished no later than, off overnight)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: flood/security lighting at display homes (time clock required)
period of operation of exhibition/display home

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
